NCRP Mock-Up: Revocations 2015-2019

Last updated/ran: 2022-08-03 10:52:02

Overview

\[ \begin{aligned} \text{values} \\ n &= \text{count of revocations from the prison admission NCRP data} \\ N &= \text{population estimate from the State Charactersitics Census data} \\ \\ \text{sub-text} \\ S &= \text{value for specific state} \\ Y &= \text{value for specific year} \\ R &= \text{value for specific race (NCPR categories)} \\ \\ R & = 1 \text{ indicates RACE = White} \end{aligned} \]

Data

Counts

\[ n_{SYR} \]

Rate per 1000

\[ \frac{n_{SYR}}{N_{SYR}} \cdot 1,000 \]

Relative Rate Index

\[ \frac{n_{SYR}/N_{SYR}}{n_{SY1}/N_{SY1}} \]

States

CA

Revocation Counts

Rate per 1,000 of Population

Relative Rate Index

MN

Revocation Counts

Rate per 1,000 of Population
